title: rulingia crispa
intro: Rulingia crispa, also known as the 'Australian native bush tomato', is a shrub native to Western Australia, characterized by its small yellow flowers and red or yellow fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rulingia crispa are attributed to its ability to improve cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Rulingia crispa include teas, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
